description: The current loyalty module credits 1 point for every 1 dollar spent. Business has updated the reward policy and now requires the system to credit 0.5 points for every 1 dollar spent. Developer needs to update the calculation logic wherever points are computed.

applies_to: Any UI/API responses showing points (if handled in backend)
additional_requirements: Apply consistent rounding (follow existing rounding rule in the service)
Update relevant unit tests and integration tests
Validate by running sample transactions with QA

acceptance_criteria: Loyalty system credits 0.5 points per dollar for all new transactions
All backend services reflect the updated calculation
No change to previously stored point balances
